Wood.description: Roughly cut wooden timber, ready for the crafting bench.
Wood.flavorText: Adapted by terraformers to life on Icarus, Earth-origin trees flourish, and appear to grow more swiftly, possibly due to exotic matter.

Wood_Wall.description: A roughly made wall, window or doorway (Hold \'R\' for variants).
Wood_Wall.flavorText: Wood structures withstand light storms without damage. Can be repaired with a repair hammer.

Wood_Halfpiece.description: Half- and quarter-sized building elements for detailed construction work.
Wood_Halfpiece.flavorText: These sets are useful for creating walkways, balconies, trims and a range of other smaller constructions.

Wood_Half_Pitch.flavorText: A two part construction element, containing a base slope and an upper slope, for building low-pitched roofs.

Wood_Floor.description: Rugged timber flooring, stronger if supported by beams.
Wood_Floor.flavorText: Durable if rudimentary flooring, prone to damage by Icarus\'s heavier weather. Notably prone to fire in lightning storms. Wooden structures can be repaired with a repair hammer.

Wood_Door.flavorText: Doors can be attached to doorways, once built.

Wood_Flare.description: A longer burning source of light in the darkness.
Wood_Flare.flavorText: \'One thing about wearing a helmet, you don\'t notice your shack smells like Satan\'s armpit.\' ~ Sol Berlinski. (Activate with secondary attack.)

Wood_Ramp.description: A basic wooden ramp or roof.
Wood_Ramp.flavorText: A ramp or a roof, depending whose hands this element is in. Able to be repaired with a repair hammer.

Berry.description: Berries will satisfy hunger, hydrate slightly, and extend endurance, but not for long.
Berry.flavorText: The intrepid prospector may also ferment wine, trusting that the quality of the resulting beverage is less important than the sheer fact of its existence.

Waterskin.flavorText: The waterskin\'s rough construction allows for rapid crafting, perfect for basic survival needs.

Wood_Bow.description: A primitive bow with limited range and durability.
Wood_Bow.flavorText: A more rudimentary bow is hard to imagine, but will prove lethal in steady, patient hands.

Wood_Spear.description: Simple to make, easy to break.
Wood_Spear.flavorText: An effective defensive weapon, and erratic low range projectile, rapidly surpassed by improved versions.

Wood_Ladder.description: A rudimentary ladder, lashed together with fiber.

Wheat.description: Process into flour using the mortar and pestle.
Wheat.flavorText: An essential ingredient to basic foods and drinks. Whether baking bread or brewing beer, wheat is where it all begins.

Kit_Wood_Cupboard.description: A place to put necessities ... and the rest.

Waterskin_Full.flavorText: The waterskin\'s rough construction allows for rapid crafting, perfect for basic survival needs.

Bed_Wood.description: Once placed in shelter, a bed can be set as a respawn location. Can also be used to sleep through the night.
Bed_Wood.flavorText: Rest, restore energy, respawn as required.

Kit_Wall_Torch.description: A mounted flame for adorning shelter walls.
Kit_Wall_Torch.flavorText: Lower oxygen levels produce a dirty, but workable flame.

Wood_Window.description: Open to let Icarus in, close to keep it out.

Wood_Rag_Torch.description: An easily crafted source of illumination.
Wood_Rag_Torch.flavorText: An ancient guiding light has found its place on Icarus, to keep the darkness at bay.

Wood_Table.description: A wooden table, like so many before it.
Wood_Table.flavorText: It\'s possible that the entirety of human culture can be extrapolated from the existence of tables.

Wood_Chair.flavorText: Driven by the demands and scarcity of life on the surface, a recognizable \'Icarus vernacular\' has swiftly emerged, spanning many forms of design, with furniture being no exception.

Wood_Wall_Angle.description: Angular inserts for gables and other tilted designs.

Wood_Railing.description: A rough, but serviceable wooden railing.

Worklamp_OmniDirectional.description: A fluorescent lamp for illuminating a large area.

Wood_TrapDoor.flavorText: Attaches to a floor trapdoor structure.

Wine.flavorText: You\'re four billion kilometers from Earth, but some things never change. Wine stops the pain, increases stamina and health regen.

Building_RepairTool.description: Maintain or upgrade your structures against the wrath of Icarus.
Building_RepairTool.flavorText: Quickly beat dislodged planks back into place, or replace those planks with sturdier materials, a single hammer does it all!

Composter_Wood.description: Change your trash into Fertilizer with this simple composter. Items placed in this device will spoil at an accelerated rate.

Wood_Beam.description: Anchors structures to the ground for higher building.
Wood_Beam.flavorText: Beams connect vertically and diagonally to support multi-level construction. Your HUD will indicate when beams are anchored with a blue cursor.

SplineTool_Water.description: A tool to help create and connect Water networks.

WildSeed_Lily.flavorText: Wherever this is planted, a lily will appear.

Rug_Conifer_Wolf.flavorText: Instantly transforms your shelter or cabin into an 18th century hunting lodge.

Paste_Water_Consumption.description: A natural preparation, temporarily reducing the body\'s need for water.

Bed_Interior_Wood.description: Once placed in shelter, a bed can be set as a respawn location. Can also be used to sleep through the night.
Bed_Interior_Wood.flavorText: A solidly made, simple place to rest and restore energy

Wood_Roof_Corner.description: A roughly cut insert for angled roofs.

Wood_Build_HalfNormal.description: A kit of half-sized wooden building elements.
Wood_Build_HalfNormal.flavorText: Wood structures withstand light storms without damage. Can be repaired with a repair hammer.

Watermelon.flavorText: Icarus produces approximately 0.003% of humanity\'s watermelons.

Wild_Salad.description: Mixed pieces of squash and pumpkin at room temperature.
Wild_Salad.flavorText: At home among the stars, yet no closer to answering the age old question: \'What is a salad, exactly?\'

Mammoth_Head.description: A preserved memory of a once-great Woolly Mammoth.
Mammoth_Head.flavorText: Who knew taxidermy would be so popular on Icarus?

Mammoth_Trophy.flavorText: Evidence of skill, patience and accuracy.

ConiferWolf_Head.description: A preserved memory of a once-great Wolf.
ConiferWolf_Head.flavorText: Who knew taxidermy would be so popular on Icarus?

ConiferWolf_Trophy.flavorText: Evidence of skill, patience and accuracy.

Water_Sprinkler.flavorText: Must be connected to a water source.

Meta_Wheat_Seed.description: Right click to open a packet of Wheat Seeds that have been stabilised for off-world farming

Meta_Watermelon_Seed.description: Right click to open a packet of Watermelon Seeds that have been stabilised for off-world farming

Meta_Repair_Item.description: A kit that can repair most workshop items at a Repair Bench.
Meta_Repair_Item.flavorText: If you break it, buy this.

Meta_Repair_Item_Pack.description: Use to collect 5x Workshop Repair Kits that can repair most Workshop Items at a Repair Bench.
Meta_Repair_Item_Pack.flavorText: For the clumsy prospector on the go.

Meta_Repair_Item_x5.description: A kit that can repair most workshop items at a Repair Bench.
Meta_Repair_Item_x5.flavorText: If you break it, buy this.

Meta_Module_World_Boss.description: Provides realtime location data on World Bosses
Meta_Module_World_Boss.flavorText: Equip in a module slot to view your world bosses on the map.

Advanced_Cloth_Head.description: Light and breathable, designed for long journeys through the harsh sands of Icarus.

Advanced_Cloth_Chest.description: Light and breathable, designed for long journeys through the harsh sands of Icarus.

Advanced_Cloth_Feet.description: Light and breathable, designed for long journeys through the harsh sands of Icarus.

Advanced_Cloth_Arms.description: Light and breathable, designed for long journeys through the harsh sands of Icarus.

Advanced_Cloth_Legs.description: Light and breathable, designed for long journeys through the harsh sands of Icarus.

Shield_Wooden.description: A rudimentary shield that can be used to block incoming attacks.

Water_Trough.description: A simple, fillable trough to provide water for tamed creatures. Use a water container to fill, or let nature do its thing when it rains.

Wood_Railing_Gate.description: A rough, but serviceable wooden railing with a gate.

Fortification_Wood_Wall.description: A large, strong wood wall fortification.
Fortification_Wood_Wall.flavorText: Claim your territory through the wonders of construction.

Fortification_Wood_Spikes.description: A large collection of spiked defenses which can be mounted to fortification walls.
Fortification_Wood_Spikes.flavorText: An extra layer of defense, prevents wildlife from working their way through your walls.

Fortification_Wood_Gate.description: A large, strong wood gate fortification which can be opened and closed.
Fortification_Wood_Gate.flavorText: From safety to wilderness, an entryway to the danger of Icarus.

Fortification_Wood_Walkway.description: A walkway and ramp set for the wood fortification walls.
Fortification_Wood_Walkway.flavorText: A protected vantage point to survey the nearby area.

Wood_Throwing_Spear.description: Simple to make, easy to break.
Wood_Throwing_Spear.flavorText: An effective defensive weapon, and erratic low range projectile, rapidly surpassed by improved versions.

Saddle_Cart.description: Place this cart inside a tamed Buffalo or Tusker\'s inventory to greatly increase its carrying capacity.
Saddle_Cart.flavorText: Lending a helping hand, or hoof.

Wood_Lure.description: A basic lure carefully crafted out of wood, to attract more fish.
Wood_Lure.flavorText: Surely you\'ll catch a big one with this in your kit.

Wolf_Lure.description: A sophisticated lure carefully crafted out of a rather unfortunate Wolf.
Wolf_Lure.flavorText: Surely you\'ll catch a big one with this in your kit.

White_Jelly_Lure.description: A sophisticated lure carefully crafted from White Jelly, to attract more fish.
White_Jelly_Lure.flavorText: Surely you\'ll catch a big one with this in your kit.

Piranha_Statue_Wood.description: One of the fish of Icarus carved out of wood.

Rabbit_Statue_Wood.description: A very rough carving of a rabbit.
Rabbit_Statue_Wood.flavorText: Looks similar to something made in shop class.

Wind_Turbine.description: A rudimentary wind turbine that will generate electricity for your work.
Wind_Turbine.flavorText: As if the UDA ever cared about being \'environmentally friendly\'...

Painting_Wood.description: A portrait painting on canvas with a wooden frame.
Painting_Wood.flavorText: Most artwork increases in value when the artist dies... the Icarus art trade must be booming.

Farming_CropPlot_T2_v2.description: A general-purpose planter bed for your crops. Fully-grown crops left too long will eventually wither and only provide spoiled plants.
Farming_CropPlot_T2_v2.flavorText: A raised planting bed brings the food to you, slowly.

Stone_Shovel.description: Can be used to collect dirt and sand when digging, or shovel snow off your roof.
Stone_Shovel.flavorText: Shift snow, or bury a friend.

Watering_Can.description: When used will water any crop plots or dirt mounds in a small area in front of you.
Watering_Can.flavorText: It\'s better to be a Prospector in a garden, than a Gardener in space.

Watering_Can_Full.description: When used will water any crop plots or dirt mounds in a small area in front of you.
Watering_Can_Full.flavorText: It\'s better to be a Prospector in a garden, than a Gardener in space.

Wood_Stack_250.description: Roughly cut wooden timber, ready for the crafting bench.
Wood_Stack_250.flavorText: Adapted by terraformers to life on Icarus, Earth-origin trees flourish, and appear to grow more swiftly, possibly due to exotic matter.

Wild_Boar_Trophy.flavorText: Evidence of skill, patience and accuracy.

Water_Purifier_T2.description: A water purifier that can be connected to a water network to filter water and make it safe for human consumption.

WildBoar_Head.description: A preserved memory of a once-great Wild Boar.
WildBoar_Head.flavorText: Who knew taxidermy would be so popular on Icarus?

Worker_Bee.description: A simple worker bee that can be used for making Honeycomb.
Worker_Bee.flavorText: The Bees of Icarus are known for their long, needle-like stingers which are capable of piercing even the toughest of envirosuits. Proceed with caution.

Smoked_White_Meat.description: A piece of white meat jerky.
Smoked_White_Meat.flavorText: Cooked in soy, chewy but not too chewy.

Saddle_Cart_Water.description: A cart which when stocked with water and pulled by an animal will water nearby crops.
Saddle_Cart_Water.flavorText: Can be pulled by a tamed Buffalo or Tusker.

Water_Barrel.description: A classic wooden barrel used to store water.
Water_Barrel.flavorText: A tried and trusted method used for generations.

Water_Borer.description: Can be placed over Enzyme Geysers across Icarus to collect & filter water from subterranean deposits.

Chicken_Head_A3.description: A preserved memory of a feathered friend.
Chicken_Head_A3.flavorText: Who knew taxidermy would be so popular on Icarus?

Wool.description: Raw wool shorn from a sheep or collected from its corpse.

CreatureBait_Wolf.description: Can be used in a Snare Trap to attract and capture wild Wolves. Only effective in Forest, Grassland, or Arctic biomes.

CreatureBait_Boar.description: Can be used in a Snare Trap to attract and capture wild Boars. Only effective in Forest or Grassland biomes.

Animal_Bed_WolfSkin.description: Juvenile animals can use this as a designated sleeping spot

Purification_Pill.description: Will remove the risk of Dysentery from Tainted / Rain water. Removes any flavour effects.\r\n\r\nTo use, Craft the \'Cool Water\' recipe on your character with this tablet and a non-pure water source in your inventory.

Horse_Head_A3.description: A preserved memory of a once loyal companion.
Horse_Head_A3.flavorText: Who knew taxidermy would be so popular on Icarus?

Wood_Burner.description: For keeping you warm in cold environments and basic cooking.

Jerry_Can_Water.description: Large bulky water can, useful for travelling.
Jerry_Can_Water.flavorText: Can also be used as weights in Defence Force Training.

Bunker_Whiteboard.description: Contains a lot of formulas and something related to exotics.

Watermelon_Lollypop.description: A watermelon flavoured lollypop, perfect for quick bursts of energy.
Watermelon_Lollypop.flavorText: Watermelon is not for everyone, but it is what we\'ve got.

Armour_Stand.description: A nicely carved stand where armor can be displayed.
Armour_Stand.flavorText: Show off your armor or use it to quickly equip, up to you prospector.

Any_Water_Container.description: Water containers come in a variety of shapes and sizes.
Any_Water_Container.flavorText: Can be used to fill with various drinks.

Windmill.description: A mill using mechanical power from wind to grind various items found on Icarus.
Windmill.flavorText: A tried and true method, used for 100s of years.

Homestead_Weapon_Rack.description: A countryside-inspired decor feature that brings character to your home. Can hold up to two weapons.

Homestead_Weapon_Rack_Single.description: A countryside-inspired decor feature that brings character to your home.

Prop_Pipe1.description: Pipes that carry all sorts of wires and electrical elements.

Saddle_Mammoth_Standard.description: Place this saddle inside a tamed creature\'s inventory to allow it to become rideable

Homestead_Wildflower_Bluebell.description: A wild flower that can be placed in pots to be used as decoration.

Homestead_Wildflower_Daisy.description: A wild flower that can be placed in pots to be used as decoration.

Homestead_Wildflower_Lavender.description: A wild flower that can be placed in pots to be used as decoration.

Homestead_Wildflower_Poppy.description: A wild flower that can be placed in pots to be used as decoration.

Homestead_Wildflower_Strawflower.description: A wild flower that can be placed in pots to be used as decoration.

Bee_Stack.description: A simple worker bee that can be used for making Honeycomb.
Bee_Stack.flavorText: The Bees of Icarus are known for their long, needle-like stingers which are capable of piercing even the toughest of envirosuits. Proceed with caution.
